query:
UPDATE requests SET
                                state = 'pending',
                                retry_attempt = $2,
                                not_before = $3,
                                daemon_id = NULL,
                                claimed_at = NULL,
                                started_at = NULL,
                                response_status = NULL,
                                response_body = NULL,
                                completed_at = NULL,
                                error = NULL,
                                failed_at = NULL,
                                canceled_at = NULL,
                                response_size = 0,
                                routed_model = NULL
                            WHERE id = $1
